# Runbook: {Name}

## Purpose
Short description of the runbook objective.

## Scope
What this runbook covers and excludes.

## Prerequisites
- Access requirements
- Environment variables / secrets
- Tools needed

## Step-by-step Procedure
1. Step 1: ...
2. Step 2: ...

## Verification
How to verify success (commands, dashboard checks).

## Rollback / Remediation
Steps to rollback or remediate if something fails.

## Contacts
- On-call: Name, pager
- Escalation: Name, contact

## Post-Incident Tasks
- Postmortem link
- Actions to prevent recurrence
